inReach

Reach me at gtissington{at}inreach{dot}garmin{dot}com

My MapShare page

My Presets

I’m OK.

“I’m OK. I’m out having pun in the back country. I’m just letting you know where I am.”

No action needed.

No communication needed or expected.

Don’t worry

“I’m delayed but everything is fine and I’m making my own way home.”

I probabaly landed far away from the car. I’m walking back, I’m fixing a falt tire, somehting like that. I have food a water and everyting is fine

I’ll try to send more inforatoin and a new ETA when I know.

Please Help.

“This is not an emergency but I cannot get home on my own. Please send assistance to this location”

I may have a mechanical problem or maybe I’m lost but have food and water.

I will try to communicate details of what is needed. I’m not expecting 911 or SAR. I’m just expecting that people who have recieved this message will coordinate an effert to come ehlp me get home.

Red Button

If I pressed this, you probably won;t know about it. If I am in medical distress I’ll send a message directly to the inReach emergency response center and coordinate with them for an evacuation.

2020
